offer: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient fuel usage causes increased operational costs. We monitor fuel consumption and flag anomalies instead of manual tracking of fuel consumption.
problem: inefficient fuel usage leading to increased operational costs
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on fuel tracking
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Participate in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try real-time fuel monitoring on 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for historical data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
